creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try adding the following to /etc/rc.conf

performance_cx_lowest="CMAX"    # Online CPU idle state
economy_cx_lowest="CMAX"        # Offline CPU idle state

it enables the intel 'c-states' which should help


Also, setting the following in /boot/loader.conf:

hint.p4tcc.0.disabled=1
hint.acpi_throttle.0.disabled=1

will remove the non 'Intel Enhanced SpeedStep' speeds from the list of frequencies that powerd will try to use, which should also save some power


also look at: https://wiki.freebsd.org/TuningPowerConsumption

It includes an example on disabling the nvidia card. While setting it to 'off' in the bios hides it, it does not actually seem to power it down.
